videos.title: I didn't pay for any of these cards ...
videos.description:
Magic: The Gathering Arena deck tech & gameplay with a blue/white/green or Bant Manifest Dread flicker combo deck, featuring Portal to Phyrexia, Growing Dread and Unnerving Grasp from Duskmourn in Standard.

Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/LegenVD
